app.name: Darla
app.subtitle: Agentic customer readiness and execution cockpit

Business: Confirm executive sponsor and measurable pilot KPI.
Frame the first release around one customer workflow with business impact.
Data: Validate the initial corpus and citation quality for the top user journeys.
Define collection boundaries and ingestion acceptance checks.
Security: Complete a security review before scaling ingestion beyond the pilot corpus.
Lock approved sources and require evidence-backed answers in every demo flow.
Infrastructure: Choose the deployment target and reserve GPU capacity for the demo environment.
Document model endpoints, vector store settings, and deployment dependencies.
Ownership: Assign a named owner for sales engineering, delivery, and customer approval.
Create a handoff path from discovery to pilot execution.
Timeline: Build a two-week POC plan with milestones, blockers, and exit criteria.
Set a review checkpoint for readiness after the first ingestion run.
